## 1. UI / Layout Tests — Vehicle List (SCR-VH-001)

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| VH-UI-001 | UI | Vehicle List page loads correctly | 1. Login as admin 2. Navigate to /master-data/vehicle | Page loads with header "Vehicle", breadcrumb, table toolbar (Search, Filter, Columns, Add New, Import, Export, Reload) | High |
| VH-UI-002 | UI | Default visible columns display correctly | 1. Open Vehicle List | Table shows 7 default columns: Plate Number, VIN, Vehicle Type, Trade Mark, Model Code, Production Country, Production Year | High |
| VH-UI-003 | UI | Plate Number column is fixed left | 1. Open Vehicle List 2. Scroll table horizontally | Plate Number column remains fixed on the left | Medium |
| VH-UI-004 | UI | Vehicle Type badge colors are correct | 1. Open Vehicle List with mixed vehicle types | Truck = positive/green, Head = info/blue, Trailer = caution/yellow | Medium |
| VH-UI-005 | UI | Row hover effect works | 1. Open Vehicle List 2. Hover over a row | Row background changes to highlight color | Low |
| VH-UI-006 | UI | Pagination displays correctly | 1. Open Vehicle List | Pagination shows with default pageSize=10 | Medium |
| VH-UI-007 | UI | Empty state displays when no data | 1. Open Vehicle List with empty dataset or filter that returns no results | TableEmptyCM component is shown | Medium |

## 2. UI / Layout Tests — Vehicle Detail (SCR-VH-002)

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |

| VH-UI-008 | UI | Vehicle Detail page layout | 1. Click on a vehicle row in list | Detail page shows: Header (Plate Number + Status Badge), Breadcrumb (Vehicle > Detail), General Information section, Specifications section, Cancel and Edit buttons | High |
| VH-UI-009 | UI | Status badge color on Detail | 1. Open detail of Active vehicle 2. Open detail of Inactive vehicle | Active = green badge, Inactive = yellow badge | Medium |

| VH-UI-010 | UI | Add New page layout | 1. Click "Add Vehicle" button | Page shows: Breadcrumb (Vehicle > Add New), General Information (Vehicle Identification + Registration & Inspection), Specifications section, Cancel and Save buttons | High |
| VH-UI-011 | UI | Switch toggles default state | 1. Open Add New page | Transportation Business=ON, Modification=ON, Tachograph=ON, Telematics=ON (all default to true per SR-VH-007) | Medium |

## 4. Functional / CRUD Tests

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| VH-FN-001 | Functional | Search vehicles by keyword | 1. Open Vehicle List 2. Type keyword in Search input 3. Trigger search | Table re-renders with filtered results matching keyword | High |
| VH-FN-002 | Functional | Filter by Plate Number | 1. Click Filter 2. Enter Plate Number filter 3. Click Apply | Table shows only vehicles matching the filter | High |
| VH-FN-003 | Functional | Filter by Vehicle Type | 1. Click Filter 2. Select Vehicle Type 3. Click Apply | Table shows only vehicles of selected type | High |
| VH-FN-004 | Functional | Sort by column ascending/descending | 1. Click on column header (e.g. Plate Number) | Table sorts ascending; click again sorts descending | Medium |
| VH-FN-005 | Functional | Column visibility toggle (SR-VH-008) | 1. Click Columns button 2. Toggle hidden columns (e.g. Status, Fuel Type) | Toggled columns appear/disappear in table | High |
| VH-FN-006 | Functional | Pagination navigation | 1. Open Vehicle List with >10 records 2. Click page 2 | Table shows records 11-20 | Medium |
| VH-FN-007 | Functional | Click row navigates to Detail | 1. Click any row in Vehicle List | Navigates to /master-data/vehicle/{vehicleCode} with correct detail data | High |
| VH-FN-008 | Functional | Navigate from Detail to Edit | 1. Open Vehicle Detail 2. Click Edit button | Navigates to /master-data/vehicle/{vehicleCode}/edit | High |
| VH-FN-009 | Functional | Cancel from Add New returns to List | 1. Open Add New 2. Click Cancel | Returns to Vehicle List | Medium |
| VH-FN-010 | Functional | Cancel from Detail returns to previous page | 1. Open Vehicle Detail 2. Click Cancel | Returns to previous page (navigate(-1)) | Medium |
| VH-FN-011 | Functional | Cancel from Edit returns to Detail | 1. Open Vehicle Edit 2. Click Cancel | Returns to Vehicle Detail | Medium |
| VH-FN-012 | Functional | Create vehicle successfully | 1. Open Add New 2. Fill all required fields 3. Click Save | Toast success → Redirect to Vehicle List → New vehicle appears in list | Critical |
| VH-FN-013 | Functional | Edit vehicle successfully | 1. Open Vehicle Edit 2. Modify fields 3. Click Save | Toast success → Redirect to Vehicle List → Updated data reflected | Critical |
| VH-FN-014 | Functional | Reload button resets filter and reloads | 1. Apply filters 2. Click Reload | Filters cleared, table reloaded with default data | Medium |

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| VH-VL-001 | Validation | Required field: Plate Number empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave Plate Number empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "Plate Number is required." | High |
| VH-VL-002 | Validation | Required field: VIN empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave VIN empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "VIN is required." | High |
| VH-VL-003 | Validation | Required field: Vehicle Inspection No empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave Vehicle Inspection No empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "Vehicle Inspection No is required." | High |
| VH-VL-004 | Validation | Required field: Model Code empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave Model Code empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "Model Code is required." | High |
| VH-VL-005 | Validation | Required field: Registration Expiration Date empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave Registration Expiration Date empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "Registration Expiration Date is required." | High |
| VH-VL-006 | Validation | Required field: Buying Date empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave Buying Date empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "Buying Date is required." | High |
| VH-VL-007 | Validation | Required field: Inspection Report No empty | 1. Open Add New 2. Leave Inspection Report No empty 3. Click Save | Inline error: "Inspection Report No is required." | High |
| VH-VL-008 | Validation | Plate Number format validation | 1. Enter special chars like @#$ in Plate Number 2. Click Save | Format error: only letters, numbers, dash(-), dot(.) and spaces allowed. Example: 29-AB 226.58 | High |
| VH-VL-009 | Validation | VIN format validation | 1. Enter spaces or special chars in VIN 2. Click Save | Format error: only letters and numbers, no spaces or special characters | High |
| VH-VL-010 | Validation | Dimension format validation (SR-VH-005) | 1. Enter invalid format in Overall Dimension (e.g. "123") 2. Click Save | Inline error: "Invalid format. Please use: 9999 x 9999 x 9999" | High |

## 6. Business Rules Tests (SR-VH)

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Rule | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| VH-BR-001 | Rule | Vehicle Code auto-generated and disabled | SR-VH-001 | 1. Open Add New 2. Check Vehicle Code field 3. Open Edit 4. Check Vehicle Code field | Vehicle Code is disabled in both Add New and Edit screens | Critical |
| VH-BR-002 | Rule | Vehicle Type changes Specifications fields | SR-VH-002 | 1. Open Add New 2. Select Vehicle Type = Truck → observe fields 3. Change to Head 4. Change to Trailer | Specifications fields show/hide according to Conditional Rendering Matrix | Critical |
| VH-BR-003 | Rule | Trailer hides Engine Number, Fuel Type, Engine Displacement | SR-VH-003 | 1. Open Add New 2. Select Vehicle Type = Trailer | Engine Number, Fuel Type, Engine Displacement fields are HIDDEN | Critical |
| VH-BR-004 | Rule | Head shows Authorized Towed Mass | SR-VH-004 | 1. Open Add New 2. Select Vehicle Type = Head | Authorized Towed Mass field is VISIBLE. 3. Change to Truck → field HIDDEN | Critical |
| VH-BR-005 | Rule | Dimension fields format L x W x H | SR-VH-005 | 1. Enter "9850 x 2500 x 3550" in Overall Dimension | Value accepted and parsed to 3 separate fields for API | High |
| VH-BR-006 | Rule | Status values Active/Inactive only | SR-VH-006 | 1. Check Status field/badge values across screens | Only "Active" and "Inactive" values exist | Medium |
| VH-BR-007 | Rule | Boolean fields as Switch toggle | SR-VH-007 | 1. Open Add New / Edit 2. Check Transportation Business, Modification, Tachograph, Telematics fields | All display as Switch toggle components | Medium |
| VH-BR-008 | Rule | Column Visibility via Table Toolbar | SR-VH-008 | 1. Open Vehicle List 2. Click Columns 3. Toggle columns on/off | Columns appear/disappear from table | High |

## 7. API Tests

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| VH-API-001 | API | GET /api/vehicles returns list with pagination | 1. Open Vehicle List 2. Inspect network | API called with page, pageSize, filters params. Returns data + pagination info | High |
| VH-API-002 | API | GET /api/vehicles/{id} returns detail | 1. Click a row 2. Inspect network | API returns nested structure: identification, registrationInfo, commonSpecification, truckSpecification, headSpecification | High |
| VH-API-003 | API | POST /api/vehicles creates vehicle | 1. Fill Add New form 2. Click Save 3. Inspect network | POST request with nested payload. Returns 200/201 with created data | High |
| VH-API-004 | API | PUT /api/vehicles/{id} updates vehicle | 1. Edit a vehicle 2. Click Save 3. Inspect network | PUT request with nested payload. Returns 200 with updated data | High |
| VH-API-005 | API | GET /countries loads for dropdown | 1. Open Add New 2. Inspect network | Country list loaded and populated in Production Country dropdown | Medium |
| VH-API-006 | API | API error returns proper error structure | 1. Simulate API failure (if possible) | Response includes error code and message, UI handles gracefully | Medium |

## 9. Error Handling Tests

| TC-ID | Category | Test Case Name | Error Code | Steps | Expected Result | Priority |
|-------|----------|----------------|------------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| VH-ER-001 | Error | Vehicle List API failure | VHC_001 | 1. Open Vehicle List when API returns 500 | Error message displayed + empty state shown | Medium |
| VH-ER-002 | Error | Vehicle Detail API failure | VHC_002 | 1. Navigate to vehicle detail when API returns 500 | Error message displayed, no data rendered | Medium |
| VH-ER-003 | Error | Save fails due to client validation | VHC_003 | 1. Click Save with empty required fields | Inline errors shown at each required field | High |
| VH-ER-004 | Error | Save fails due to server error | — | 1. Click Save when BE returns 500 | Toast negative with error message or fallback "An error occurred" | Medium |
